allow: Bash(gcloud beta billing projects describe omnichannel-ai-platform:*)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name'], '-', m.get\('displayName',''\)\) for m in data.get\('models',[]\)]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); \(j.publisherModels||[]\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.name, '-', m.displayName\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,2000\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.error\){console.log\('Error:',JSON.stringify\(j.error\)\)} else { \(j.publisherModels||[]\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.name, '-', m.displayName || ''\)\); } }catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,1000\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.nextPageToken\) console.log\('nextPage:', j.nextPageToken\); \(j.publisherModels||[]\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.name\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,500\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); \(j.publisherModels||[]\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.name\)\); if\(j.error\) console.log\('Err:',j.error.message?.substring\(0,100\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,200\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); \(j.models||[]\).forEach\(m=>{ const sup=m.supportedGenerationMethods||[]; console.log\(m.name, '|', m.displayName, '| methods:', sup.join\(','\)\) }\); if\(j.error\) console.log\('Err:',JSON.stringify\(j.error\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,500\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j,null,2\).substring\(0,1000\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,500\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j,null,2\).substring\(0,500\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,300\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j,null,2\).substring\(0,400\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,200\)\)} }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); \(j.services||[]\).map\(s=>s.name\).filter\(n=>n.includes\('aiplatform'\)||n.includes\('ml'\)||n.includes\('vision'\)||n.includes\('speech'\)||n.includes\('language'\)||n.includes\('gemini'\)||n.includes\('vertex'\)||n.includes\('generative'\)\).forEach\(n=>console.log\(n\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.substring\(0,500\)\)} }\)")
